ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "league" TEXT /* Name of the league in which the match was played */,
  "team" TEXT /* Name of the team participating in the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Winning team of the match */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Format of the match (e.g., Best of 5, Single match) */,
  "patch_version" TEXT /* Game patch version used in the match */,
  "spectators" INTEGER /* Number of spectators for the match */,
  "tournament_stage" TEXT /* Stage of the tournament (e.g., Group Stage, Playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., Top, Jungle, Mid, Bot, Support) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Current team of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the team */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the player's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match in which the statistics were recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player whose statistics are recorded */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills made by the player */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of times the player died */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "gold_earned" INTEGER /* Gold earned by the player */,
  "total_damage_dealt" INTEGER /* Total damage dealt to champions */,
  "total_heal" INTEGER /* Total healing done by the player */,
  "vision_score" INTEGER /* Vision score of the player */,
  "damage_taken" INTEGER /* Total damage taken by the player */,
  "gold_spent" INTEGER /* Total gold spent by the player */,
  "wards_destroyed" INTEGER /* Number of wards destroyed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match in which the statistics were recorded */,
  "team" TEXT /* Name of the team whose statistics are recorded */,
  "total_kills" INTEGER /* Total kills made by the team */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths of the team */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the team */,
  "total_gold_earned" INTEGER /* Total gold earned by the team */,
  "total_damage_dealt" INTEGER /* Total damage dealt to champions by the team */,
  "vision_score" INTEGER /* Vision score of the team */,
  "damage_taken" INTEGER /* Total damage taken by the team */,
  "turrets_destroyed" INTEGER /* Number of turrets destroyed by the team */,
  "inhibitors_destroyed" INTEGER /* Number of inhibitors destroyed by the team */,
  "dragons_slain" INTEGER /* Number of dragons slain by the team */,
  "barons_slain" INTEGER /* Number of barons slain by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES players ("team")
)

CREATE TABLE "ward_placements" (
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match in which the wards were placed */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who placed the wards */,
  "wards_placed" INTEGER /* Number of wards placed by the player */,
  "wards_killed" INTEGER /* Number of wards killed by the player */,
  "vision_wards_bought" INTEGER /* Number of vision wards bought by the player during the game */,
  "vision_score" INTEGER /* Vision score of the player */,
  "vision_wards_destroyed" INTEGER /* Number of vision wards destroyed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ward_placements_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ward_placements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heroes" (
  "hero_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hero */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hero */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the hero in the game (e.g., Tank, Support) */,
  "total_kills" INTEGER /* Total kills made by this hero */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths of this hero */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by this hero */,
  "pick_rate" REAL /* Percentage of times the hero is picked in matches */,
  "ban_rate" REAL /* Percentage of times the hero is banned in matches */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate of the hero */,
  "average_kda" REAL /* Average KDA (Kills, Deaths, Assists) of the hero */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hero_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, coach, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player receiving feedback */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match related to the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments and suggestions provided */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was created */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating (e.g., 1 to 5) along with the feedback */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback is private and visible only to the player and the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match in which the event occurred */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., kill, assist, ward placed) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player involved in the event */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the event (e.g., coordinates, participants) */,
  "event_duration" REAL /* Duration of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Top, Jungle) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the role icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the league takes place */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league */,
  "prize_pool" INTEGER /* Total prize pool of the league */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* URL of the league's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)
